Title: About Our School
Content: At Collï¿½ge des Sï¿½urs du Rosaire ï¿½ Jbeil, we are committed to nurturing generations of students through a balanced education that combines academic excellence, strong values, and personal development. Since our establishment in 1970, our mission has been to provide a supportive and inspiring environment where students are encouraged to think critically, act responsibly, and grow with confidence. Guided by the educational vision of the Rosary Sisters, we aim to develop capable, ethical, and open-minded individuals who are prepared to contribute positively to their communities and the world. Through dedication, innovation, and care, we continue to shape minds and build futures.
